title: 🏆 Mob Trophies
description: Decorative mob trophies made of Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Emerald, and Netherite. Hunt. Collect. Display.
body:
![mobtrophies_tittle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56e0a7495befb838b1b2cd4dc4515c0e42d21731.png)

**Mob Trophies** is a decorative expansion for Minecraft **1.21.11 (Fabric)**. Hunt, collect, and proudly display mob heads and trophies made from different mineral tiers. Build the ultimate trophy room!

### ✨ Key Features
- **36 new blocks** (18 heads + 18 pedestal trophies)
  - Mobs included: **Zombie**, **Skeleton**, **Creeper** (+ 1 Tester variant per mob for testing/creative use)
  - **Tiers (6 levels):** Copper → Iron → Gold → Diamond → Emerald → **Netherite**
- **Vanilla+** style with high-quality textures that blend perfectly with the base game
- **Fully waterloggable** — heads and trophies work perfectly underwater
- Full support for **15+ languages**

### 🌐 Supported Languages
English, Spanish (ES, MX, AR, UY, VE), French (FR + CA), German, Portuguese (BR + PT), Russian, Japanese, Korean, Chinese... and more coming soon.

### 🛠️ Crafting & Requirements
- Use **EMI**, **REI**, or **JEI** to view recipes (highly recommended)
- Requires **Fabric API**
- Minecraft **1.21.11**

### 📝 FAQ
**Can I include this in my modpack?**  
Yes! You have full permission to add it to any modpack.

**Where can I report bugs or suggest new mobs?**  
→ [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/soys1les/MobTrophies/issues)

Keep hunting and decorating your base in style! 🏆💀🧨🔥
